description_long: This is a glass jar filled with a deep red strawberry jam, sealed with a dark gray metal lid. The front label features the brand name 'Faragello' in white on a red background, with the words 'Strawberry Jam' and Arabic text below, surrounded by images of ripe strawberries and a red-and-white checkered pattern. The sides of the jar display additional product information, including ingredients and nutritional facts, printed in black text on a white background. The jam inside is visible through the transparent glass, giving the jar a rich, appetizing appearance. The overall design is classic and inviting, suitable for display in a grocery store or on a kitchen shelf. The jar is cylindrical with a slightly narrower neck and a wide base for stability.
description: A glass jar of Faragello strawberry jam with a red-and-white checkered label, metal lid, and visible red jam inside. The label features strawberries, branding, and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello brand logo, 'Strawberry Jam' text, Arabic script, and strawberry graphics on a checkered label.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the continuation of the checkered label and a block of small black text, likely ingredients or product details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutritional facts panel and more detailed product information on a white background.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the transition between the nutritional label and the main branding, with the checkered pattern wrapping around.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Faragello' brand logo is visible on the front label, featuring white text on a red background with a small graphic above the name.
attribute_flavor_indication: The label clearly indicates 'Strawberry Jam' with images of strawberries and the word 'Strawberry' in both English and Arabic.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutritional facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back and side of the jar, printed in black text on a white background.
